meta.summary: SPAdes genome assembler toolkit for isolate, single-cell, metagenomic, transcriptomic, viral, plasmid, biosynthetic, sequence-to-graph alignment and related short-read assembly workflows.
meta.description: SPAdes genome assembler toolkit for isolate, single-cell, metagenomic, transcriptomic, viral, plasmid, biosynthetic, sequence-to-graph alignment and related short-read assembly workflows.

test: test "$(cat /opt/spades/share/spades/VERSION)" = '4.2.0' && spades.py --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'SPAdes genome assembler v4.2.0' >/dev/null

spades.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'SPAdes genome assembler' >/dev/null && spades.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--isolate' >/dev/null && spades.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--meta' >/dev/null && metaspades.py --help 2>&1 | grep -i 'meta' >/dev/null

plasmidspades.py --help 2>&1 | grep -i 'plasmid' >/dev/null && rnaspades.py --help 2>&1 | grep -i 'rna' >/dev/null && metaviralspades.py --help 2>&1 | grep -i 'viral' >/dev/null && coronaspades.py --help 2>&1 | grep -i 'corona' >/dev/null

for x in spades-core spades-hammer spades-corrector-core spades-ionhammer spades-kmercount spades-kmer-estimating spades-read-filter spades-gbuilder spades-gmapper spades-gsimplifier spades-gfa-split binspreader pathracer pathracer-seq-fs spaligner; do command -v "$x" >/dev/null; ! ldd "$(command -v "$x")" 2>&1 | grep -F 'not found' >/dev/null; done

rm -rf /tmp/taf-spades-test && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-spades-test && cd /tmp/taf-spades-test && spades.py --test -t 1 > run.log 2>&1 && test -s spades_test/contigs.fasta && test -s spades_test/scaffolds.fasta && grep -F 'TEST PASSED CORRECTLY' run.log >/dev/null

upstream.name: SPAdes
upstream.citation: Prjibelski et al. 2020; Bankevich et al. 2012; mode-specific SPAdes publications
